summary: Solid Dead show with a standout High Time and Beat It On Down The Line, though the recording source and quality are not described.
review: Both reviewers enjoyed this performance, noting an energetic first set and a memorable second‑set High Time. The show is described as solid with highlights like Beat It On Down The Line, but no details about the audio source or fidelity were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) focus on strong musical moments; lack of recording details prevents a higher rating, resulting in an overall ~4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer commented on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or other technical aspects.

standout_songs: Beat It On Down The Line
show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic first set leading into a strong second set highlighted by High Time; overall solid pacing and vibe.
